metadata.description: Procedure altitude and speed constraints extracted from RKPC STAR and ILS/LOC chart text for simulator managed vertical guidance.
principles: Only chart/text constraints currently present in rkpc_procedures.json are encoded here.
STAR at-or-above constraints protect a minimum altitude and do not command descent by themselves.
ILS/APP IAF/IF/FAF crossing altitudes are approach setup targets even when the chart wording is minimum-style.
At-or-below and at constraints can generate managed descent targets, but shall not create automatic climbs without a controller altitude instruction.
AIP '@' speed values are managed maintain targets unless a controller speed instruction is active.
AIP '-' altitude cells inside a STAR coding table carry forward the prior '@' altitude until the next explicit altitude constraint.

notes: STAR coding-table '-' altitude cells are interpreted as carry-forward maintain from the prior '@' altitude row during DES VIA.
STAR '@' speed cells are interpreted as managed maintain targets unless controller speed mode is active.
Final ILS glidepath after LIMSO/TOKIN is computed by procedure guidance using the glide_path_ft_per_nm value.
